mapper.select: SELECT * FROM suppliers ORDER BY supplier_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM suppliers
(supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_name, phone, address) VALUES (#{supplierName}, #{phone}, #{address})
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.model, p.cost_price AS costPrice, sp.is_primary AS isPrimary FROM supplier_products sp JOIN products p ON sp.product_id = p.product_id WHERE sp.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY sp.is_primary DESC, p.product_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO supplier_products (supplier_id, product_id, is_primary) VALUES (#{supplierId}, #{productId}, 0)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM supplier_products WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_products SET is_primary = 0 WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE supplier_products SET is_primary = 1 WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND product_id = #{productId}
